title: BeOne's Beqalzi Wins FDA Approval as Venclexta Challenger
headline: BeOne Medicines' Beqalzi receives FDA approval on May 13, 2026, becoming the first new BCL-2 inhibitor approved in a decade and a direct challenger to AbbVie/Roche's blockbuster Venclexta.
key_facts: FDA approval date: May 13, 2026; First new BCL-2 inhibitor since Venclexta's 2016 approval (10-year gap); Venclexta is a multi-billion-dollar annual revenue asset

title: Takeda Cuts 4,500 Jobs in $1.3B Restructuring
headline: Takeda announces elimination of approximately 4,500 roles in 2026 as part of a $1.26 billion cost-cutting program targeting 2028.
key_facts: Total savings target: $1.26 billion by 2028; 2026 savings target: ~$633 million; Headcount impact: ~4,500 roles in 2026

title: Novo Nordisk and Lilly Escalate GLP-1 Obesity Rivalry
headline: Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly both present new obesity data on the same day, intensifying the GLP-1 competitive battle with maintenance strategy focus.
key_facts: Lilly low-dose Zepbound and oral Foundayo maintenance data (SURMOUNT-MAINTAIN, ATTAIN-MAINTAIN); LLY stock: +2.61% on May 13

title: Merck KGaA CEO Signals Heavy M&A Strategy Focus
headline: Merck KGaA's newly installed CEO Beckmann emphasizes M&A as a primary growth driver, with geopolitical tailwinds supporting business guidance.
key_facts: New CEO: Beckmann; Iran-related client stockpiling supporting guidance boost in life science/CDMO business

title: FDA Leadership Vacuum Deepens After Makary Exit
headline: FDA Commissioner Marty Makary's May 12 resignation leaves the agency with temporary directors in three top positions, creating regulatory uncertainty.
key_facts: Makary resignation announced May 12, 2026; Kyle Diamantas named acting commissioner; Three top positions now filled by temporary directors; Replimune (REPL) surged 8%+ on May 12; Leqembi SC PDUFA extended to August 24

title: Hantavirus Biotech Rally Fading as Analysts Call Overdone
headline: The hantavirus cruise ship outbreak-driven biotech rally (Moderna, Novavax, Emergent BioSolutions) cools as analysts cite low contagion risk.
key_facts: Outbreak sparked rally ~May 8-11; Novavax fell 5%, Emergent BioSolutions fell 1%, Inovio fell 1% post-surge; Biotech sector +1.09%, Drug Manufacturers +1.55% on May 13

title: Galapagos Completes Rebrand to Lakefront Biotherapeutics
headline: Galapagos NV completes strategic transformation by rebranding as Lakefront Biotherapeutics following years of setbacks.
key_facts: Rebrand completed May 13, 2026; Follows $5.1B Gilead partnership (2019); Strategic reset after filgotinib setbacks

title: Tessera Reports 85% Blood Cell Editing Efficiency
headline: Tessera Therapeutics achieves 85% blood cell editing efficiency with infusion-based approach, pointing toward off-the-shelf sickle cell solution.
key_facts: 85% editing efficiency in blood cells; Infusion-based off-the-shelf approach; Reported May 13, 2026

title: Valneva Cuts Up to 15% of Workforce
headline: Valneva announces layoffs of up to 15% of staff as reduced travel demand impacts its vaccine business.
key_facts: Up to 15% workforce reduction; Driven by reduced travel demand affecting vaccine business
